<details>
<summary>📝 Walkthrough</summary>

## Walkthrough

This PR updates KeyboardLayoutsViewModel to remove its Context/string-resource dependency, changes `createLayout` and `duplicate` to accept explicit name parameters, makes `KeyboardLayoutListItem.name` nullable, and bounds the previously infinite unique-name retry loop. KeyboardLayoutsScreen adds a `displayName()` extension resolving built-in layout names and threads computed names into row rendering, dialogs, and creation/duplication calls. Separately, TerminalKeyboard's `KeyButton` now conditionally applies a semantics `contentDescription` when both description and text are present. Corresponding tests were updated/added.

### Sequence Diagram(s)

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  participant Screen as KeyboardLayoutsScreen
  participant ViewModel as KeyboardLayoutsViewModel
  participant Repository as KeyboardLayoutRepository

  Screen->>Screen: compute newLayoutName / duplicateName
  Screen->>ViewModel: createLayout(newLayoutName)
  ViewModel->>Repository: createWithUniqueName(newLayoutName)
  Repository-->>ViewModel: layoutId
  Screen->>ViewModel: duplicate(item.id, duplicateName)
  ViewModel->>Repository: create duplicate with unique name
  Repository-->>ViewModel: layoutId
```

</details>

<!-- walkthrough_end -->

## Code Review

This pull request refactors the keyboard layout management by removing the Android Context dependency from KeyboardLayoutsViewModel, shifting string resource resolution to the UI layer. It also adds accessibility semantics to KeyButton in TerminalKeyboard and introduces a retry limit when generating unique layout names. The review feedback suggests optimizing performance by lazily resolving duplicate names inside the click handler using LocalContext, refactoring the retry loop in the view model to eliminate a redundant repository call, and enabling mergeDescendants in the button semantics to improve accessibility behavior.

> [!IMPORTANT]
> The [consumer version of Gemini Code Assist on GitHub](https://developers.google.com/gemini-code-assist/docs/review-repo-code) is being sunset. Starting **June 18, 2026**, new organization installations will be blocked, and all code review activity will officially cease on **July 17, 2026**.
> For more details on the timeline and next steps, please review the [Help Documentation](https://developers.google.com/gemini-code-assist/docs/deprecations/consumer-code-review).

![medium](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/medium-priority.svg)

Import `LocalContext` to allow retrieving the Android context for deferred resource resolution.

```suggestion
import androidx.compose.ui.platform.LocalContext
import org.connectbot.keyboard.DefaultKeyboardLayouts
```

![medium](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/medium-priority.svg)

Retrieve the `LocalContext` instance to use for deferred string resource resolution inside the list item callbacks.

```suggestion
    val context = LocalContext.current
    val newLayoutName = stringResource(R.string.keyboard_layouts_new)
```

![medium](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/medium-priority.svg)

Instead of resolving the duplicate name string for every single item in the list during composition, retrieve it lazily inside the `onDuplicate` click handler using the retrieved `context`. This avoids unnecessary resource lookups during composition and improves list rendering performance.

```suggestion
                val itemName = item.displayName()
                KeyboardLayoutRow(
                    item = item,
                    name = itemName,
                    isDefault = item.id == uiState.defaultLayoutId,
                    onSetDefault = { viewModel.setDefault(item.id) },
                    onEdit = { onNavigateToEditor(item.id) },
                    onDuplicate = {
                        scope.launch {
                            val duplicateName = context.getString(R.string.keyboard_layouts_duplicate_name, itemName)
                            onNavigateToEditor(viewModel.duplicate(item.id, duplicateName))
                        }
                    },
```

**Actionable comments posted: 1** > [!CAUTION] > Some comments are outside the diff and can’t be posted inline due to platform limitations. > > > >
> ⚠️ Outside diff range comments (1)
> >
> app/src/test/kotlin/org/connectbot/ui/screens/keyboard/KeyboardLayoutsViewModelTest.kt (1)
> > `97-108`: _📐 Maintainability & Code Quality_ | _🔵 Trivial_ | _⚡ Quick win_ > > **Consider adding coverage for the bounded-retry exhaustion path.** > > This cohort's key behavior change is bounding the previously infinite retry loop, but no test exercises what happens once `CREATE_UNIQUE_NAME_MAX_ATTEMPTS` is exhausted (e.g., via a mocked repository that always throws `SQLiteConstraintException` from `create()`). Given the crash risk flagged in `KeyboardLayoutsViewModel.kt`, a regression test here would also double as a safety net once that's fixed. > >
> 🤖 Prompt for AI Agents > > ``` > Verify each finding against current code. Fix only still-valid issues, skip the > rest with a brief reason, keep changes minimal, and validate. > > In > `@app/src/test/kotlin/org/connectbot/ui/screens/keyboard/KeyboardLayoutsViewModelTest.kt` > around lines 97 - 108, Add a regression test for the bounded retry exhaustion > path in KeyboardLayoutsViewModelTest by exercising > KeyboardLayoutsViewModel.createLayout when repository.create() always throws > SQLiteConstraintException, so CREATE_UNIQUE_NAME_MAX_ATTEMPTS is fully consumed. > Use the existing KeyboardLayoutsViewModel and repository/prefs test setup, then > assert the method fails in the expected way once retries are exhausted and does > not loop forever. Keep the existing unique-name coverage, but add a separate > test that specifically verifies the max-attempts limit behavior. > ``` > >
> > > >
> >
🤖 Prompt for all review comments with AI agents ``` Verify each finding against current code. Fix only still-valid issues, skip the rest with a brief reason, keep changes minimal, and validate. Inline comments: In `@app/src/main/java/org/connectbot/ui/screens/keyboard/KeyboardLayoutsViewModel.kt`: - Around line 130-139: In createWithUniqueName, the retry logic still leaves a final repository.create(uniqueName(base), spec) outside the loop, so a persistent SQLiteConstraintException can escape from createLayout()/duplicate() and fail the coroutine. Update the KeyboardLayoutsViewModel createWithUniqueName flow to keep the last attempt inside the retry handling or otherwise guarantee the max-attempt behavior is enforced consistently, and make CREATE_UNIQUE_NAME_MAX_ATTEMPTS match the actual number of insert attempts. --- Outside diff comments: In `@app/src/test/kotlin/org/connectbot/ui/screens/keyboard/KeyboardLayoutsViewModelTest.kt`: - Around line 97-108: Add a regression test for the bounded retry exhaustion path in KeyboardLayoutsViewModelTest by exercising KeyboardLayoutsViewModel.createLayout when repository.create() always throws SQLiteConstraintException, so CREATE_UNIQUE_NAME_MAX_ATTEMPTS is fully consumed. Use the existing KeyboardLayoutsViewModel and repository/prefs test setup, then assert the method fails in the expected way once retries are exhausted and does not loop forever. Keep the existing unique-name coverage, but add a separate test that specifically verifies the max-attempts limit behavior. ```
🪄 Autofix (Beta) Fix all unresolved CodeRabbit comments on this PR: - [ ] Push a commit to this branch (recommended) - [ ] Create a new PR with the fixes

📒 Files selected for processing (5) * `app/src/main/java/org/connectbot/ui/components/TerminalKeyboard.kt` * `app/src/main/java/org/connectbot/ui/screens/keyboard/KeyboardLayoutsScreen.kt` * `app/src/main/java/org/connectbot/ui/screens/keyboard/KeyboardLayoutsViewModel.kt` * `app/src/test/kotlin/org/connectbot/TerminalKeyboardContentTest.kt` * `app/src/test/kotlin/org/connectbot/ui/screens/keyboard/KeyboardLayoutsViewModelTest.kt`

_🩺 Stability & Availability_ | _🟠 Major_ | _⚡ Quick win_

<details>
<summary>🧩 Analysis chain</summary>

🏁 Script executed:

```shell
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

# Locate and inspect the relevant files/sections.
printf '\n== KeyboardLayoutsViewModel.kt ==\n'
wc -l app/src/main/java/org/connectbot/ui/screens/keyboard/KeyboardLayoutsViewModel.kt
sed -n '1,240p' app/src/main/java/org/connectbot/ui/screens/keyboard/KeyboardLayoutsViewModel.kt | cat -n

printf '\n== KeyboardLayoutsScreen.kt matches ==\n'
rg -n "createLayout|duplicate|try|catch|finally" app/src/main/java/org/connectbot/ui/screens/keyboard/KeyboardLayoutsScreen.kt

printf '\n== KeyboardLayoutsScreen.kt relevant section ==\n'
sed -n '1,260p' app/src/main/java/org/connectbot/ui/screens/keyboard/KeyboardLayoutsScreen.kt | cat -n
```

Repository: hbmartin/connectbot

Length of output: 19349

---



</details>

**Handle exhausted unique-name retries**

The final `repository.create(uniqueName(base), spec)` is still outside the retry loop, so a persistent name collision can throw `SQLiteConstraintException` out of `createLayout()` / `duplicate()` and crash the launched coroutine. `CREATE_UNIQUE_NAME_MAX_ATTEMPTS` also counts 11 inserts as written; fold the last attempt into the loop or rename the constant to match.

<details>
<summary>🤖 Prompt for AI Agents</summary>

```
Verify each finding against current code. Fix only still-valid issues, skip the
rest with a brief reason, keep changes minimal, and validate.

In
`@app/src/main/java/org/connectbot/ui/screens/keyboard/KeyboardLayoutsViewModel.kt`
around lines 130 - 139, In createWithUniqueName, the retry logic still leaves a
final repository.create(uniqueName(base), spec) outside the loop, so a
persistent SQLiteConstraintException can escape from createLayout()/duplicate()
and fail the coroutine. Update the KeyboardLayoutsViewModel createWithUniqueName
flow to keep the last attempt inside the retry handling or otherwise guarantee
the max-attempt behavior is enforced consistently, and make
CREATE_UNIQUE_NAME_MAX_ATTEMPTS match the actual number of insert attempts.
```

</details>

<!-- fingerprinting:phantom:poseidon:beignet -->

<!-- cr-indicator-types:potential_issue -->

<!-- cr-comment:v1:2e8a7009760f889d9afcc5e7 -->
